title: Much Better Leaves Bare Bones
description: Adds 3d leaves to the Bare Bones texture pack
body:
![Leaves](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4ae37c8a7160e3836e93ebda8615ca087516c031.png)
Adds 3d leaves to the Bare Bones texture pack to improve your gameplay. Default Bare Bones Requied.

### Check my others projects:
- [Bare Bones: 3D Mace](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/3d-mace-but-bare-bones)
